channel.title: Readings on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Readings on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Readings
item.description: The reading assignments listed below are what you should read before coming to class. The class lectures assume this reading has been done, and while you may not completely understand the material you will have a familiarity with the concepts and transactions we will be covering each day. Additional short readings (e.g., recent business press articles) will be distributed in class. Readings that refer to “Pratt” can be found in the course textbook, J.
